test_cases.description: Verifies skill mandates bidirectional return tags — if A links to B, B must link to A
test_cases.input: My English page has hreflang pointing to my French page but the French page doesn't link back — is this a problem?

test_cases.description: Verifies skill identifies common invalid codes like 'en-uk' and 'jp'
test_cases.input: I'm using 'en-uk' for British English and 'jp' for Japanese in my hreflang — correct?

test_cases.description: Verifies sitemap method is recommended for large sites with many language variants
test_cases.input: I have 1000 pages in 5 languages — should I use HTML link tags or sitemap for hreflang?
